title: Slovakian Smoky Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful stir-fry dish inspired by Slovakian cuisine, with smoky notes from the bacon and a crunchy texture from the nuts.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms

instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the pan and set aside.
Add the mixed vegetables to the pan and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cooked bacon back into the pan, along with the soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
Stir in the chopped nut rolls and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the stir-fry over the cooked rice and garnish with chopped parsley.
